name: domainatrix
description: A domain name analysis and management tool built with Next.js, Drizzle ORM, and Tailwind CSS.
author: Pink Pixel <admin@pinkpixel.dev>

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run rebuild && rm -rf .next/standalone/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && cp -rL node_modules/better-sqlite3 .next/standalone/node_modules/ && mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && ln -sfn $(pwd)/public .next/standalone/public && ln -sfn $(pwd)/.next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder install-app-deps && rm -rf .next/standalone/node_modules/better-sqlite3 .next/standalone/.next/node_modules && cp -rL node_modules/better-sqlite3 .next/standalone/node_modules/ && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder install-app-deps && rm -rf .next/standalone/node_modules/better-sqlite3 .next/standalone/.next/node_modules && cp -rL node_modules/better-sqlite3 .next/standalone/node_modules/ && electron-builder --linux
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder install-app-deps && rm -rf .next/standalone/node_modules/better-sqlite3 .next/standalone/.next/node_modules && cp -rL node_modules/better-sqlite3 .next/standalone/node_modules/ && electron-builder --win
